jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Vedantu
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Vedantu in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vedantu:
Vedantu is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedantu!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
